since_last: 34% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.03%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.35% · BTC +2.76% · Gold +1.62% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 34% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.03%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.03%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -7.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -14.15%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.96%, ISRG +4.83%, ADBE +4.68%, ADBE +4.68%, AAPL +4.55%. Laggards: TER -14.15%, KLAC -13.42%, LRCX -11.31%, CEVA -11.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.86% at $158.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.86% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
